title: Xbox Tests Ad-Supported Cloud Streaming, No Game Pass Required
summary: Microsoft is testing ad-supported Xbox games, giving consumers a free way to play in exchange for viewing a commercial. Microsoft didn't specify which devices are supported, but the Xbox Insider program is available on Xbox consoles and Windows 10 and 11 PCs.
caption: output/2026-07-23/xbox-tests-ad-supported-cloud-streaming-no-game-pass-required.txt
